# GIT STATUS
Current branch: 
Main branch (you will usually use this for PRs): 

Recent commits:


# TODOs
No TODOs yet, if you are working on tasks that would benefit from a todo list please use the todoWrite tool to create one.</system-reminder>

You are an OS engineer comparing how `jj` handles branches compared to Git. In a provided repository at `/home/user/repo`, there is a single commit with a bookmark `main`.
Your task is to:
1. Use `jj` to create a new commit on top of `main` that adds a file `git_semantics.txt` with the text 'git semantics'. Describe the commit as 'add git semantics'.
2. Create a bookmark named `git_branch` pointing to this new commit.
3. Use `jj` to create another new commit on top of `main` that adds a file `jj_semantics.txt` with the text 'jj semantics'. Describe the commit as 'add jj semantics'.
4. Create a bookmark named `jj_branch` pointing to this second new commit.
5. Export the bookmarks to git using `jj git export`.
6. Run a `jj log` command that shows only the `git_branch` and `jj_branch` commits, and save the output to `/home/user/comparison_log.txt`.

todos.content: Inspect /home/user/repo state and confirm jj repository setup
Create jj commit on top of main adding git_semantics.txt and bookmark git_branch
Create jj commit on top of main adding jj_semantics.txt and bookmark jj_branch
Export bookmarks to git and save filtered jj log to /home/user/comparison_log.txt

output.output:
/home/user/repo
@  ympuwxnv (no email set) 2026-03-11 12:10:58 dc877702
│  (empty) (no description set)
○  poslltlx test@example.com 2026-03-11 12:10:58 main d6716614
│  initial commit
◆  zzzzzzzz root() 00000000

todos.content: Inspect /home/user/repo state and confirm jj repository setup
Create jj commit on top of main adding git_semantics.txt and bookmark git_branch
Create jj commit on top of main adding jj_semantics.txt and bookmark jj_branch
Export bookmarks to git and save filtered jj log to /home/user/comparison_log.txt

input.command: jj new main -m 'add git semantics' && printf 'git semantics' > git_semantics.txt && jj bookmark set git_branch -r @

output.output:
Working copy  (@) now at: vkmtvvpz c19ed2d7 (empty) add git semantics
Parent commit (@-)      : poslltlx d6716614 main | initial commit
Created 1 bookmarks pointing to vkmtvvpz 73b4f6ee git_branch | add git semantics

todos.content: Inspect /home/user/repo state and confirm jj repository setup
Create jj commit on top of main adding git_semantics.txt and bookmark git_branch
Create jj commit on top of main adding jj_semantics.txt and bookmark jj_branch
Export bookmarks to git and save filtered jj log to /home/user/comparison_log.txt

input.command: jj new main -m 'add jj semantics' && printf 'jj semantics' > jj_semantics.txt && jj bookmark set jj_branch -r @

output.output:
Working copy  (@) now at: uvorlqst f204b744 (empty) add jj semantics
Parent commit (@-)      : poslltlx d6716614 main | initial commit
Added 0 files, modified 0 files, removed 1 files
Created 1 bookmarks pointing to uvorlqst 1a92a4b7 jj_branch | add jj semantics

todos.content: Inspect /home/user/repo state and confirm jj repository setup
Create jj commit on top of main adding git_semantics.txt and bookmark git_branch
Create jj commit on top of main adding jj_semantics.txt and bookmark jj_branch
Export bookmarks to git and save filtered jj log to /home/user/comparison_log.txt

input.command: jj git export && jj log -r 'bookmarks(git_branch) | bookmarks(jj_branch)' > /home/user/comparison_log.txt && cat /home/user/comparison_log.txt

output.output:
@  uvorlqst test@example.com 2026-03-19 11:13:44 jj_branch 1a92a4b7
│  add jj semantics
~

○  vkmtvvpz test@example.com 2026-03-19 11:13:40 git_branch 73b4f6ee
│  add git semantics
~
Nothing changed.

todos.content: Inspect /home/user/repo state and confirm jj repository setup
Create jj commit on top of main adding git_semantics.txt and bookmark git_branch
Create jj commit on top of main adding jj_semantics.txt and bookmark jj_branch
Export bookmarks to git and save filtered jj log to /home/user/comparison_log.txt

input.result:
Completed in /home/user/repo.

Actions performed:
- Created a commit on top of main with description: add git semantics
- Added git_semantics.txt containing: git semantics
- Created bookmark: git_branch
- Created a second commit on top of main with description: add jj semantics
- Added jj_semantics.txt containing: jj semantics
- Created bookmark: jj_branch
- Exported bookmarks to Git with jj git export
- Saved a filtered jj log showing only those two bookmark commits to /home/user/comparison_log.txt

Saved log contents:

│  add jj semantics
~
